guide:
**Quest Name:** Gramash Ruins Quests
**Level:** 47
**Class:** All/All
**NPC:** Grimm Brellhand
**Location:** Gramash Ruins (S)

---

## 🟢 Quest 1: Gramash Ruins
**NPC:** Grimm Brellhand
*Ability part is Quest 2—but you must complete Quest 1 first*

1. Talk to **Grimm Brellhand**. Coach to Murnf, run NE to Gramash Ruins (S). Grimm is in the blacksmith house. Use invis to avoid mobs.
2. Find ore: talk to **Head Foreman Zeke** in Gerntars Mine, help with minotaurs.
3. Buy pickaxe for 3000 tunar from **Quartermaster Malda**, equip, head to Minotaur caves. Use invis.
4. In first cave, go to back, get popup to dig.
5. Skip second cave, go to third cave. Ends of both tunnels: get 2 more ores.
6. Talk to **Gilthirn Ironhoof** in third cave. He tells you about **Khelmarak**.
7. Go to back of second cave, popup spawns **Khelmarak** (Lvl 48-49, sees invis). Kill, loot horn; 6 minotaurs appear, no agro.
8. Talk to **Gilthirn Ironhoof** again, give horn, gain HUGE faction with minotaurs.
9. Return to **Zeke** to OK ores.
10. Return to **Grimm**.
11. Grimm sends you to **Cazic Thule (N)** temple.
12. Drop into pyramid, find Excavator & Tunneler.
13. Tunneler: deadend hallway with 3 Tae Ew facing wall; kill placeholder till spawn.
14. Excavator: sunken floor room, 2 door guards, 2 ramp guards, Stone Golem, 2 Tae Ew, 1 roamer. Spawn directly across from Golem. Placeholder middle guy. *NOTE:* Spawns may take time. Pull mobs one at a time to safe corner; detailed pull instructions provided.
15. Once both ores obtained, return to **Grimm** for class reward & 7,083,126 XP.

---

## 🟡 Quest 2: Gramash Ruins (ABILITY)
**NPC:** Grimm Brellhand

1. Talk to **Grimm Brellhand**. He wants **Ball of Everfrost** & **Ancient Bottle of Elven Wine** to summon **Margun Leafstrider**.
*NOTE:* Pre-obtain items before logging quest.

A. Elven Wine: Buy in Freeport for 3000 tunar from **Merchant Gilgash**.
B. Ball of Everfrost: Drops from **Ice Goblin Melder** (CONs YEL) in **Permafrost (N)**, Vox Castle. Goblin Shamans & Wizards see invis; need full group.

2. Navigate castle halls, kill placeholders until **Melder** spawns, avoid roamers.
3. Take Ball & Wine back to **Grimm**.
4. Find hollow tree in **Gramash Ruins (C)**, north of Grimm, perform summoning. Margun Leafstrider spawns; branch located SW of Holciel Rowen'Dal.
5. Find **Tilmiraen** in Deathfist Forge (NW). Small bowl valley north of first hill. He gives branch after agreeing to help.
6. Teleport to **Twisted Towers (S) Fairy Village**; illusion to fairy form.
*NOTE:* If you die, lose fairy form; must return to Tilmiraen to retry.
7. Find **Mugwort** (far east mushroom house), speak, return to original teleport point, con "tiny door" to Tilmiraen.
8. Speak with **Tilmiraen**, instructed to kill **Twizzletwig** in **Takish'Hiz (SW)**.
9. Twizzletwig (Lvl 50) triggered spawn; get popup SE near blue lake, run south past 4 small pillars, he spawns walking on road. Kill, loot Potion of Ever-Rot.
10. Return to **Tilmiraen**, receive one root.
11. Return to **Grimm** for class item, new spell/ability, XP.

---

## 🔵 Quest 3: Gramash Ruins
**NPC:** Grimm Brellhand

1. Talk to **Grimm**. Hammer broke, needs Thulite for new anvil.
2. Go to **Cazic Thule (N)** temple, enter, right side of pyramid, kill **Dark Elf Miner**, loot mining log.
3. Return log to **Grimm**.
4. Go to **Guk**, find **Maerik N'Toxis** in castle bottom of Froglok cave. Use invis; avoid Fungal Elders. Kill placeholders until Maerik spawns (drops 2 scrolls). *Note:* Spawns can take 1-10 hours.
5. Return scrolls to **Grimm**.
6. Go to **Highpass**, find **Feldink Shortquill** (2nd floor, tower where Lord Voriander is), pay 3000 tunar to translate.
7. Return to **Grimm**, he instructs to reanimate **Thulite Golem**; need **Golem Part A & B** from Golem Protectors.
8. Go to **Tak'Xiv (SW)**. Golem Protectors spawn inside hut on walkway, level 48-49, can't see invis. Pull one at a time.
9. With parts, activate **Thulite Golem**. Level 50, kills player, drops 4 Huge Chunks of Thulite.
10. Return to **Grimm**, reward: XP & class item.
